---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a feature or workflow improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What user or product problem are we trying to solve?

## Proposed change
Describe the proposed feature or workflow change.

## Why this matters
Why is this worth adding now?

## Product impact
Which area does this affect?
- [ ] collection flow
- [ ] consent/auth flow
- [ ] review flow
- [ ] draft generation
- [ ] HomeTax assist
- [ ] architecture / contracts
- [ ] developer workflow

## Risks / tradeoffs
What gets more complex, brittle, or ambiguous if we do this?

## Additional context
Links, examples, or related docs/issues.
